title: TURTLE PUZZLE — Eva relaxing
prompt: Medium two-shot in @dentist-waiting. @Sara on the LEFT sits cross-legged inside one of the giant white molar-tooth armchairs, leaning over a colorful turtle-themed puzzle on a small bright-yellow box stand, sliding a green turtle piece into place with concentration. @Eva on the RIGHT kneels on the sea-turtle floor mural beside the puzzle station, leaning in too, pointing emphatically at a different spot. Both relaxed and giggling — Eva has clearly forgotten she was scared. Sara (concentrating): "The green turtle goes RIGHT here." Eva (loud, helpful, bossy): "NO! Green turtle goes by the PINK fish! See? OBVIOUSLY." Sara pauses, looks at where Eva is pointing, then nods. Sara (deadpan): "...you're right." Both burst into giggles.
